{"body":"# Enhancement: Remove AdminBar from frontend layout

| | |
|---|---|
| **Category** | Enhancement |
| **Scope** | Frontend |
| **Priority** | 🟡 P2 — Medium |

## Summary
Remove the AdminBar component from the frontend layout entirely. It's currently visible on the login page and all frontend pages, but isn't needed in this context.

## Requirements
Remove from `src/app/(frontend)/layout.tsx`:
- Import: `import { AdminBarWrapper } from '@/ui/web/AdminBar/AdminBarWrapper'` (line 13)
- Component usage: `<AdminBarWrapper adminBarProps={{ preview: isEnabled }} />` (lines 107–111)

## Affected Area
src/app/(frontend)/layout.tsx

## Acceptance Criteria
- `AdminBarWrapper` is no longer rendered in the frontend layout
- No orphaned import for `AdminBarWrapper` remains

## Additional Context
Research notes:
- `AdminBarWrapper` imported at layout.tsx:13, rendered at layout.tsx:107–111
- The element `<div.py-2.bg-foreground.text-background.sm:block.hidden>` targeted by the user is the AdminBar, confirmed at that location

","title":"Remove AdminBar from frontend layout"}
